interfaces.name: getPrimaryNavigation
interfaces.description: Get the primary navigation sections (labels only, no URLs) for the site header, including Serve, Events, Give, Get Help, Care & Prayer, About, and Contact.

label.description: Display label for the navigation item.

order.description: Display order in the navigation bar.

interfaces.name: getHomepageHighlights
interfaces.description: Get homepage highlight content: featured volunteer opportunities, outreach events, giving funds, and quick actions like get help, prayer request, and email devotionals.

locationSummary.description: Short location text, e.g., 'Downtown Campus – 123 Main St'.

nextShiftStart.description: ISO datetime of the next upcoming shift.

suggestedAmount.description: Optional suggested gift amount for this fund.

iconKey.description: Icon identifier to use in UI.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerOpportunityFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sorting options for the Volunteer Opportunities listing page.

interfaces.name: searchVolunteerOpportunities
interfaces.description: Search volunteer opportunities for the listing page using filters like category, ZIP+radius, date range, time of day, and days of week. Returns summarized results with next available shift.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Postal code to search near, e.g., '30301'.

parameters.name: radiusMiles
parameters.description: Search radius in miles, e.g., 5 or 10.

parameters.name: dateRangeStart
parameters.description: Start date (inclusive) for shifts in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

parameters.name: dateRangeEnd
parameters.description: End date (inclusive) for shifts in 'YYYY-MM-DD' format.

distanceMiles.description: Distance from search ZIP, if ZIP provided.

nextShiftStart.description: ISO datetime of earliest matching upcoming shift.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerOpportunityDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific volunteer opportunity, including description, requirements, and location info, for the detail page.

parameters.name: volunteerOpportunityId
parameters.description: ID of the VolunteerOpportunity selected from the listing or homepage.

upcomingShiftsCount.description: Number of upcoming shifts for this opportunity.

interfaces.name: getVolunteerOpportunityShifts
interfaces.description: Get the list of upcoming shifts for a specific volunteer opportunity, to display on the opportunity detail page.

interfaces.name: registerForVolunteerShift
interfaces.description: Register the current user for a specific volunteer shift, creating a VolunteerShiftRegistration and returning confirmation.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Volunteer’s full name as entered in the form.

spotsRemainingAfter.description: Updated spots remaining for this shift, if tracked.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sorting options for the Events listing page, including categories, cost, format, campus, time of day, day of week, and activity level.

interfaces.name: searchEvents
interfaces.description: Search events for the Events listing page, including workshops, outreach events, and neighborhood cleanups, with filters such as category, cost, format, campus, location, date range, time of day, day of week, and activity level.

parameters.name: zip
parameters.description: Postal code to search near, for location-based events.

parameters.name: radiusMiles
parameters.description: Search radius in miles for ZIP-based searches.

parameters.name: isOutreachEligibleOnly
parameters.description: If true, only return events where is_outreach_eligible is true.

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a specific event, including description, date and time, campus, cost, format, requirements, and whether it can be added to the outreach plan.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the Event selected from listings or homepage.

requirements.description: Any prerequisites or notes for attendees.

canAddToOutreachPlan.description: True if event is outreach-eligible and in the future.

interfaces.name: registerForEvent
interfaces.description: Register or RSVP for an event by creating an EventRegistration and returning confirmation.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the Event to register for.

parameters.name: registrationType
parameters.description: Registration type, e.g., 'registration' for workshops or 'rsvp' for cleanups. If omitted, derived from event.

parameters.name: fullName
parameters.description: Optional full name; if provided and first/last not given, used for display.

parameters.name: numAttendees
parameters.description: Total number of people including the registrant, e.g., 1 or 3.

interfaces.name: addEventToOutreachPlan
interfaces.description: Add an event to the single-user outreach plan (creating a plan if needed) and return the updated plan item summary.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the Event to add to the outreach plan.

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Optional note about participation to attach to this plan item.

interfaces.name: getMyOutreachPlan
interfaces.description: Get the single-user outreach plan and its items to display on the 'My Outreach Plan' page.

interfaces.name: updateOutreachPlanItemNote
interfaces.description: Update the note for an item in the outreach plan.

parameters.name: outreachPlanItemId
parameters.description: ID of the OutreachPlanItem to update.

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: New note text for this item.

interfaces.name: removeOutreachPlanItem
interfaces.description: Remove an event from the outreach plan.

parameters.name: outreachPlanItemId
parameters.description: ID of the OutreachPlanItem to remove.

interfaces.name: getGivingFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the giving page, including frequencies, available funds for multi-fund giving, allocation modes, and payment methods.

interfaces.name: submitDonation
interfaces.description: Submit a donation from the giving form, including multi-fund allocations and payment details, and return confirmation.

interfaces.name: getFoodResourceFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the Food Resources page, including categories, days open, time-of-day slots, and service tags.

interfaces.name: searchFoodResources
interfaces.description: Search food resources such as food pantries using filters for category, day open, time of day, and services offered.

parameters.name: timeOfDayKey
parameters.description: Time-of-day filter, e.g., 'afternoon_after_1500' for after 3:00 PM.

nextOpenDescription.description: Short description like 'Open Wed 3:00 PM – 6:00 PM'.

interfaces.name: getFoodResourceDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific food resource, including address, phone, map link, and hours by day.

parameters.name: foodResourceId
parameters.description: ID of the FoodResource selected from the listing.

interfaces.name: getPrayerRequestFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get prayer categories, privacy options, and a suggested focus date (e.g., next upcoming Sunday) for the prayer request form.

suggestedFocusDate.description: Date string 'YYYY-MM-DD' for the next upcoming Sunday.

interfaces.name: submitPrayerRequest
interfaces.description: Submit a prayer request with category, privacy setting, focus date, message, and optional contact info.

interfaces.name: getContactFormOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the Contact Us form, including subjects and alternative contact information.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a contact message with subject, message body, and contact information.

parameters.name: message
parameters.description: Message body, can include pasted phone numbers or other details.

interfaces.name: getDevotionalSignupOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for the devotional sign-up page, including email frequencies, age groups, and topic checkboxes.

interfaces.name: submitDevotionalSubscription
interfaces.description: Submit a devotional email subscription with frequency, age group, selected topics, and contact info.

parameters.name: textOnly
parameters.description: True if subscriber prefers text-only emails.

interfaces.name: getAboutPageContent
interfaces.description: Get content for the About page, including mission, vision, core outreach values, highlighted outreach programs, and basic campus information.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateOutreachPlan
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to fetch or create the single-user OutreachPlan record for the current session.

helperFunctions.name: _geocodeZipToLatLng
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to convert a ZIP/postal code to latitude/longitude for distance and radius filtering.

helperFunctions.name: _calculateDistanceMiles
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute distance in miles between a search coordinate and entity coordinates (events, volunteer opportunities, food resources).

helperFunctions.name: _classifyTimeOfDaySlot
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to map exact times to logical time-of-day buckets like 'morning', 'afternoon', 'afternoon_after_1500', 'evening'.

helperFunctions.name: _processDonationPayment
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to integrate with the payment gateway, process card/ACH/PayPal payments, and set Donation.transaction_status and confirmation_number.

helperFunctions.name: _getNextUpcomingSunday
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to calculate the date of the next upcoming Sunday for use as a suggested prayer focus date.
